metadata.description: Name of the the environment which is used to generate a short unique hash used in all resources.
Primary location for all resources (filtered on available regions for Azure Open AI Service).
Existing Voice Live endpoint to reuse instead of deploying a new AI Services resource. Leave empty to deploy new AI Services.
Optional existing AI Services resource ID used only for role assignment when existingVoiceLiveEndpoint is provided.
Id of the user or app to assign application roles. If ommited will be generated from the user assigned identity.
Optional Voice Live BYOM profile (e.g., byom-azure-openai-chat-completion).
Optional Voice Live foundry resource override for BYOM routing.
Optional existing ACS connection string. When set, infra will reuse this ACS and skip creating a new Communication Services resource.
Creates an Application Insights instance based on an existing Log Analytics workspace.
Creates a dashboard for an Application Insights instance.

chart.title: Average processor and process CPU utilization

metadata.description: The name of the container image
